news.headline: Azure Power in India refinanced over $500 million of debt in the current fiscal year through REC and HSBC, completing early bond payment.
news.summary: In the current financial year, Azure Power Global Limited, a top sustainable energy solutions provider and renewable power producer in India, has refinanced over $500 million in debt. This significant announcement was made in Gurugram, India on October 17, 2024.

news.headline: Sabre Corp to webcast Q3 2024 earnings call on Oct 31 at 9 am ET. Management will discuss financial results.
news.summary: A technology company based in Southlake, Texas, Sabre Corporation, announced its plans to hold a live webcast for its third quarter earnings conference call on October 31, 2024, starting at 9:00 a.m. ET. The event will provide insights into the financial performance of the company during that quarter and offer forward-looking perspectives. Sabre Corporation, listed on the NASDAQ as SABR, aims to engage stakeholders and investors through this platform.

news.headline: Vonage launches AI-powered contact center experience, Vonage Contact Center (VCC) Intelligent Workspace, enhancing agent productivity, Ericsson acquires Vonage.
news.summary: In Holmdel, New Jersey on October 17, 2024, Vonage, a prominent player in cloud communications aiding businesses in enhancing their digital strategies and a subsidiary of Ericsson (NASDAQ: ERIC), introduced the Vonage Contact Center (VCC) Intelligent Workspace. This innovative platform utilizes artificial intelligence to offer a dynamic new interface for agents, revolutionizing their work experience.

news.headline: Former CIA COO Andy Makridis joins DXC Technology as top advisor in public sector, showing commitment to innovation.
news.summary: DXC Technology, a prominent global technology services provider listed on the NYSE as DXC, has demonstrated its dedication to outcome-driven innovation for clients by appointing Andy Makridis as the new Chief Operating Officer. This move, announced on October 17, 2024, in Ashburn, Virginia, signifies the company's commitment to enhancing client services. DXC Technology, a Fortune 500 company, continues to prioritize innovation and client satisfaction in its operations.

news.headline: Potomac Bancshares, Inc. declares quarterly dividend in Charles Town, W.Va. (OTC:PTBS).
news.summary: In Charles Town, West Virginia, on October 17, 2024, the Board of Directors of Potomac Bancshares, Inc. announced a quarterly dividend. Potomac Bancshares, Inc. is the sole bank holding company for Bank of Charles Town, also known as The Community's Bank. The Company's stock is listed as OTC:PTBS. The decision was made during the October Board meeting.

news.headline: Honiture showcases pet-friendly innovations at GITEX & Canton Fair, emphasizing investment in cleaning technologies.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE, on October 17, 2024, Honiture announced plans to boost investment in pet and deep cleaning technologies. The company aims to deliver cutting-edge cleaning products for pet owners, emphasizing convenience and innovation. These advancements were showcased at GITEX as part of Honiture's commitment to enhancing cleaning solutions.

news.headline: DISCO welcomes Susan Garcia as General Counsel & Chief Compliance Officer effective Oct 14, 2024 - a leader in legal tech.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, DISCO (NYSE: LAW) revealed their latest addition to the team - Susan Garcia, who will take on the roles of General Counsel and Chief Compliance Officer starting October 14, 2024. With a focus on AI-driven legal tech, DISCO operates in a space that navigates innovation, regulation, and data security. Garcia brings extensive experience in commercial software and risk management, positioning her well to contribute to DISCO's future growth.

news.headline: Clinch is now part of Amazon Ads Partner Network, able to optimize campaigns across Amazon properties.
news.summary: Clinch has received certification that allows it to enhance campaigns on specific Amazon owned platforms, including streaming TV, online video, display, and mobile inventory. This certification signifies that Clinch can optimize ad serving and personalization on these properties. The announcement was made in New York on Oct 17, 2024.

news.headline: Permira acquires Squarespace for $7.2 billion in all-cash transaction, removes it from NYSE. CEO retains majority of shares.
news.summary: Permira, a global investment firm, has finalized the acquisition of Squarespace, Inc. in an all-cash deal worth around $7.2 billion. Following the transaction, Squarespace has ceased trading on the New York Stock Exchange. The acquisition involved Squarespace Founder & CEO Anthony Casalena rolling over a significant portion of his stake in the company.

news.headline: Images in Motion Media Inc. in Sonoma, CA repurposes sets and puppets, blending creativity with sustainability.
news.summary: A company called Images in Motion Media Inc. in Sonoma, California is blending creativity with sustainability by repurposing sets and puppets. The studio, known for its TV puppetry, is taking recycling to a new level. As of October 17, 2024, they have managed to repurpose various materials, not limited to bottles and paper, to create their sets and puppets. This initiative showcases their commitment to promoting sustainability in their creative endeavors.

news.headline: Traders price in less Fed easing after retail sales and jobless claims numbers.
Pat Parelli to open Parelli Landing, a new horsemanship campus, in Johnsonville, SC in January 2025.
news.summary: In January 2025, Pat Parelli, renowned for his contributions to natural horsemanship, will inaugurate Parelli Landing: The Horseman's Academy in Johnsonville, South Carolina. This new consolidated year-round campus aims to provide comprehensive education and training in horsemanship. Scheduled to open after the announcement on October 17, 2024, this initiative is set to offer a unique learning experience for equestrians. The academy is poised to attract a diverse range of individuals interested in honing their horsemanship skills.

news.headline: LightPath Technologies will participate in LD Micro Main Event XVII on October 29, 2024. NASDAQ: LPTH, provider of optics, to attend conference.
news.summary: In Orlando, Florida, on October 17, 2024, LightPath Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: LPTH), a prominent supplier of advanced optics and imaging systems for defense and commercial uses, disclosed that its management has received an invitation. The company is recognized for its cutting-edge solutions in the industry.

news.headline: Non-profit jscreen focuses on proactive genetic screening to lower breast cancer risk. Promotes awareness during Breast Cancer Awareness Month.
news.summary: In observance of Breast Cancer Awareness Month, jscreen, a non-profit organization focused on preventing genetic diseases and cancer, is increasing its outreach efforts. The organization aims to educate the public about the importance of proactive measures.

news.headline: VFX expert Alan Chan debuts novel "Abundance," adding to his successful career in Hollywood. #AlanChan #Abundance #Hollywood
news.summary: In Dallas on October 17, 2024, Alan Chan, an acclaimed visual effects expert and writer-director, achieved a new milestone in his career. With a track record including contributions to numerous award-winning advertising campaigns, such as those recognized with Clio Awards, and to Academy Award-winning films, Chan's success is undeniable.

news.headline: Chung-Ang University researchers create new GAN model in Seoul, using kernel functions and histogram transformations for training stability and efficiency.
news.summary: AI has taken a significant leap forward with the introduction of the GAN model in Seoul, South Korea on October 17, 2024. This innovative model employs kernel functions and histogram transformations to tackle stability and efficiency concerns in AI development. The advancements in AI and deep learning technology in recent years have been remarkable, paving the way for further progress in this field.

news.headline: Verde Resources Inc. launches VerdePlus to redefine infrastructure, establishes new subsidiary VerdePlus Inc.
news.summary: A notable development was unveiled by Verde Resources Inc. as they recently set up VerdePlus Inc., a subsidiary, subsequent to the successful installation at the National Center for Asphalt Technology (NCAT) Test Track. This advancement comes after the announcement made on Oct. 17, 2024. Operating under the OTCQB stock symbol VRDR, Verde Resources Inc. shared details about the establishment of VerdePlus Inc. as they continue to make waves in the industry.

news.headline: Public sector faces shortage of accountants; AICPA and NASACT call for higher pay and fees, audit rule changes.
news.summary: In a joint effort, AICPA and NASACT are advocating for improved compensation for government CPAs along with higher fees, emphasizing the need to provide greater support to local governments. Additionally, they are calling for a reassessment of current audit regulations. The organizations highlight the significant challenges faced by state and local governments due to a scarcity of accounting professionals, underscoring the importance of addressing this issue promptly. The push for enhanced pay and fees aims to bolster recruitment and retention efforts within the public sector, ultimately fostering a more sustainable financial environment for government entities.

news.headline: Madison River Hash Co. in Montana introduces premium hash cannabis products made with Clean Green Certified Flower. Leading producer in the state.
news.summary: Located in Bozeman, Montana, on October 17, 2024, Madison River Hash Company revealed its high-end series of hash cannabis items, made exclusively with Clean Green Certified Flower. Recognized as the primary supplier of premium hash products in Montana, the company boasts a picturesque setting on the Madison River.

news.headline: Ahmad Alaswad appointed as Executive Director of Amaanah Refugee Services in Houston, brings 10+ years of experience.
news.summary: In Houston on October 17, 2024, Amaanah Refugee Services revealed Ahmad Alaswad as their new Executive Director. Possessing more than ten years of expertise in government, public administration, and nonprofit management, Alaswad assumes the role with a strong background in leadership.

news.headline: Familia.AI introduces AI family app for emotional support and family legacy preservation. Launch date: Oct. 17, 2024.
news.summary: In San Francisco on October 17, 2024, Familia.AI unveiled their new AI-driven family app on their website familia.ai. The innovative app aims to generate virtual family members, safeguard family histories, and offer emotional assistance utilizing artificial intelligence technology. This launch introduces a unique approach to supporting users in their familial relationships and legacy preservation.

news.headline: Quantela partners with CVIEW in $50M collaboration for Media Industry data analytics & healthcare advertising assets.
news.summary: Quantela, a top data analytics provider for the Media Industry, has revealed a key collaboration with CVIEW, a groundbreaking healthcare Digital Advertising Assets network operator. This strategic partnership, announced on October 17, 2024, brings together the expertise of both companies to enhance their services. Digital Alpha is supporting this initiative as the lead investor. This move signifies a significant development in the industry, highlighting the growing importance of leveraging data analytics in media and healthcare sectors to drive innovation and effectiveness.

news.headline: American Salars Lithium Inc. is reviewing Quebec properties near recent lithium discoveries by Q2 Metals Corp. and Sayona Mining Limited.
news.summary: Vancouver-based American Salar Lithium Inc. has revealed their plan to conduct a strategic evaluation of various Canadian mineral properties with potential for lithium. These properties are located near recent pegmatite lithium findings, such as Q2 Metals Corp.'s Cisco Lithium Project and several projects possessed by Sayona Mining Limited, which is the sole lithium producer in Canada. The company is listed as CSE: USLI, OTC: USLIF, FWB: Z3P, WKN: A3E2NY. The update was publicized on October 17, 2024.

news.headline: Richtech Robotics to manage 20 new Walmart-located restaurants using robotics & AI tech in AZ, CO, TX.
news.summary: AlphaMax Management LLC, a subsidiary of the company, plans to enhance efficiency by implementing robotics and AI cloud technology in restaurants located in Arizona, Colorado, and Texas.

news.headline: Inozyme Pharma to present interim data from Phase 1 SEAPORT 1 trial of INZ-701 at ASN Kidney Week 2024 in San Diego, for patients with ESKD on hemodialysis.
news.summary: In Boston on October 17, 2024, Inozyme Pharma, Inc. (Nasdaq: INZY) disclosed that interim results from the Phase 1 SEAPORT 1 trial of INZ-701 in patients with end-stage kidney disease (ESKD) on hemodialysis will be shared at the American Society of Nephrology (ASN) Kidney Week 2024 in San Diego on October 24-27, 2024. Inozyme is a biopharmaceutical company focusing on rare diseases affecting bone health and blood vessel function. This forthcoming presentation will offer crucial insights into the innovative therapeutics being developed by the Company for this patient population.

news.headline: Boralex's greenhouse gas emissions reduction targets validated by SBTi, aiming for net-zero emissions by 2050. #CorporateResponsibility
news.summary: In Montreal on October 17, 2024, Boralex inc. revealed its achievement in becoming one of the select companies in the renewable energy industry to have its greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions reduction objectives endorsed by the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi). The validation signifies Boralex's dedication to attaining net-zero GHG emissions by 2050 throughout its complete value chain is science-driven and in accordance with the Paris Agreement's targets of curbing global temperature rises to below 1.5oC. The company's stock symbol on the Toronto Stock Exchange is BLX.

news.headline: Kane Biotech partners with XSONX for a 5-year exclusive deal to distribute Wound Hygiene System in multiple countries.
news.summary: In Winnipeg, Manitoba, on October 17, 2024, Kane Biotech Inc. disclosed the signing of an exclusive five-year distribution contract with XSONX LLC for the distribution of XSONX’s Wound Hygiene System in Canada, Australia, New Zealand, and the Gulf Cooperation Council Countries. Kane Biotech, trading on TSX-V as KNE and on OTCQB as KNBIF, will be responsible for distributing the system in the mentioned Territories.

news.headline: Bridgeline Digital announces update to HawkSearch's Rapid UI Framework, enhancing Smart Response with new GenAI feature.
news.summary: In Woburn, Massachusetts on October 17, 2024, Bridgeline Digital, Inc. revealed a significant development to HawkSearch's Rapid UI Framework. This technology company, listed on the NASDAQ as BLIN, specializes in AI-driven marketing solutions. The updated framework streamlines the incorporation of Smart Response into search interfaces through its component-based structure. The latest release features an additional component designed specifically for HawkSearch's Smart Response. Moreover, a new GenAI feature has been introduced to enhance the functionalities of Smart Search, which was initially introduced earlier in the year.

news.headline: CleanCore Solutions, Inc. (ZONE) finalizes deal with Knight-Swift Transportation (NYSE: KNX), a major freight firm.
news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.5%, the lowest it has been in over a decade. The economy added 250,000 jobs last month, surpassing expectations and marking a significant increase in job growth. Additionally, the stock market saw a record high, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average reaching 35,000 points for the first time. Experts attribute this positive economic trend to various factors, including increased consumer spending and business investments. Overall, these numbers indicate a strengthening economy and bode well for future economic prospects.

news.headline: Tarsus debuts TV ad campaign for XDEMVY® eye solution at 0.25%, targeting demodex blepharitis with mite visuals.
news.summary: An advertising campaign is highlighting the main cause of Demodex blepharitis by creatively displaying mischievous mites on the eyelids of affected patients. The campaign aims to raise awareness about the issue and educate the public about the prevalence of these microscopic parasites. With approximately 65% of people over the age of 60 being affected by Demodex mites, the campaign showcases the need for early detection and proper treatment to prevent complications related to demodicosis.

news.headline: Great Pacific Gold appoints Ron Gawi as Country Manager, Papua New Guinea, effective immediately. TSXV: GPAC, OTCQX: FSXLF.
news.summary: Great Pacific Gold Corp. has recently appointed Ron Gawi as the Country Manager for Papua New Guinea. This announcement was made on October 17, 2024, by the company headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia. Gawi will assume this role with immediate effect. Great Pacific Gold is known by its stock symbols on various exchanges, including TSXV: GPAC, OTCQX: FSXLF, and Germany: V3H.

news.headline: TV show Before The Fame with Mike Sherman by Universal Media Group nominated for Suncoast Emmy for third year.
news.summary: For the third year in a row, the popular TV show "Before The Fame with Mike Sherman," produced by Universal Media Group, Inc., has been recognized with a nomination for a Suncoast Emmy award. This ongoing success highlights the show's quality and appeal, further solidifying its position as a top contender in the industry.

news.headline: Study finds Nexalin’s DIFS improves memory & cognitive function in Alzheimer’s patients; Increases neural activity & blood flow in hippocampus, offers hope for treatment.
news.summary: A significant trial has unveiled that DIFS, a potential treatment for Alzheimer’s, has shown promising results. The study demonstrated that DIFS leads to a notable enhancement in neural activity and blood flow specifically in the hippocampus. These findings suggest a potential breakthrough in Alzheimer’s treatment, igniting hope for those affected by the disease. The trial highlights the positive impact of DIFS, indicating a potential avenue for further research and development in combating Alzheimer’s.

news.headline: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings to discuss third quarter 2024 financial results on Oct 31 at 10am Eastern Time.
news.summary: Miami-based Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd. (NYSE: NCLH) is set to release its third quarter 2024 financial results on October 31, 2024, at 7:30 a.m. Eastern Time. The Company, in conjunction with NCL Corporation Ltd., will host a conference call and webcast at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day to discuss the outcomes. Investors and interested parties can tune in for insights into the Company's performance during this period.

news.headline: Potbelly Corp (NASDAQ: PBPB) to discuss Q3 2024 results on Nov 7, announced in Chicago on Oct 17, 2024.
news.summary: Potbelly Corporation, a renowned sandwich shop concept, has revealed that it will disclose its financial results for the third quarter of 2024 on October 17, 2024. Trading under the ticker symbol PBPB on NASDAQ, the Company is eagerly anticipated to report its performance for the mentioned period.

news.headline: LM Funding America, Inc. reports $9.6 million in Bitcoin holdings as of September 30, 2024.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida on October 17, 2024, LM Funding America, Inc. (NASDAQ: LMFA), a company focused on cryptocurrency mining and technology-based financing, released a preliminary, unaudited report on their Bitcoin mining operations for the month ending on September 30, 2024.

news.headline: Banzai partners with Salesforce for enhanced webinar campaigns, offering users real-time insights and engagement integration.
news.summary: Demio has integrated Account Engagement into their platform, providing Salesforce users with streamlined workflows and real-time insights to improve their webinar strategy. This integration allows users to leverage important data and enhance their performance. With this update, users can access vital information seamlessly and make informed decisions during webinars. The integration of Account Engagement in Demio empowers Salesforce users with the necessary tools to optimize their webinar approach, leading to better engagement and results.

news.headline: Canadian North Resources to join 2024 International Mining and Resources Conference in Sydney, Australia, part of Ontario Mining Mission.
news.summary: Canadian North Resources Inc. is set to take part in the 2024 International Mining and Resources Conference in Sydney, Australia with a strong presence from their side as part of the Ontario Mining Mission. This mission, backed by the Government of Ontario and in partnership with the Canadian Consulate General in Sydney, is a strategic move by Canadian North Resources Inc. to showcase their offerings to a wider audience. The mission aims to offer the Company exposure and potential collaborations within Australia and the Asia-Pacific region, providing a platform for connecting with key partners. TSXV: CNRI, OTCQX: CNRSF, and FSE: EO0 are the tags associated with the Company for this international venture.

news.headline: White House celebrates success, 1 million people benefit from student loan forgiveness through Public Service Loan Forgiveness.
news.summary: A campaign to enhance and promote the Public Service Loan Forgiveness initiative has led to the forgiveness of student loans for more than a million individuals.

news.headline: Pagaya, Citi, Jefferies, and Milken Institute discuss consumer lending trends at Money20/20 in Las Vegas. AI, payments, and credit reshaping sector. CEO Gal Krubiner to moderate.
news.summary: In New York, Pagaya CEO Gal Krubiner is set to moderate a discussion at the Money20/20 conference in Las Vegas on October 29 at 10:05 AM. The panel will include Citi Retail Services' Head of Connected Commerce Terry O’Neil, Jefferies Global Investment Banking Co-Head Andrea Lee, and Milken Institute Fintech Director Nicole Valentine. The discussion will focus on key industry trends, such as the impact of AI and the growing use of embedded payment products. This event showcases the expertise of these industry leaders and their insights on the future of finance.

news.headline: Energous names Mallorie Burak as new CEO and board member, she will continue as CFO, effective immediately.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, Energous Corporation, operating as Energous Wireless Power Solutions (NASDAQ: WATT), a leader in scalable over-the-air wireless power networks, has named Mallorie Burak as the permanent Chief Executive Officer and a Board member with immediate effect. Burak, currently serving as the Chief Financial Officer, will maintain this role. She transitions from her interim CEO and CFO positions to take on these new responsibilities.

news.headline: Global Payments (NYSE: GPN) to report Q3 2024 financial results on Oct 30, 2024. Market opens on that day.
news.summary: Atlanta-based Global Payments Inc. (NYSE: GPN) is set to unveil its financial performance for the third quarter of 2024 on Wednesday, October 30, 2024, prior to the market's opening.

news.headline: OSI Systems (Nasdaq: OSIS) to hold Q1 conference call on Oct 24, 2024 at 9:00 am PT to discuss results for quarter ended Sept 30, 2024. Replay available from 12:00 pm PT on Oct 24 until Nov 8, 2024. Webcast at www.osi-systems.com.
news.summary: Hawthorne, California - OSI Systems, Inc. (Nasdaq: OSIS) has announced that it will conduct its quarterly conference call on Thursday, October 24, 2024, at 9:00 am PT to review the results for the quarter that ended on September 30, 2024. The conference call will be webcasted on the investor relations section of www.osi-systems.com. For those unable to join the live call, a replay will be available starting from 12:00 pm PT on October 24, 2024, until November 8, 2024. The replay can be accessed via the investor relations website.

news.headline: Zuora to be acquired by Silver Lake and GIC for $1.7 billion, becoming privately held company.
news.summary: Zuora, Inc., a prominent monetization suite for modern businesses based in Redwood City, California, declared today that it will be acquired by Silver Lake, a top technology investment firm, along with an affiliate of GIC Pte. Ltd., in a deal totaling $1.7 billion. This acquisition will lead to Zuora becoming a privately held entity. As per the agreement, Silver Lake and GIC will take over.

news.headline: Belden Inc. (NYSE: BDC) to report Q3 2024 results on Oct 31 before trading; conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET.
news.summary: St. Louis-based Belden Inc. (NYSE: BDC), a top provider of network infrastructure solutions, is set to announce its fiscal third-quarter results for the period ending September 29, 2024, prior to the start of trading on Thursday, October 31, 2024. The company's management will delve into the financial outcomes during a conference call scheduled for 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. Interested parties can access a webcast of the call and related presentation materials on Belden's official website in the Investor Relations section.

news.headline: Vonage launches AI-powered Vonage Contact Center Intelligent Workspace for seamless customer communication.
news.summary: Vonage, a prominent cloud communications company and a subsidiary of Ericsson (NASDAQ: ERIC), recently unveiled Vonage Contact Center (VCC) Intelligent Workspace in Holmdel, New Jersey. This innovative AI-driven agent platform is integrated into their renowned contact center solution. VCC Intelligent Workspace is crafted to facilitate smooth customer interactions across various channels, ensuring agents can provide excellent service without becoming inundated. This advancement aims to streamline operations and enhance customer engagement.

news.headline: Cass Information Systems Q3 2024 earnings: $0.21/share ($2.9M net income), down from $0.54/Q3 2023 & $0.32/Q2 2024. Earnings impacted by $6.6M bad debt.
news.summary: In St. Louis, Cass Information Systems, Inc. (Nasdaq: CASS) reported third quarter 2024 earnings of $0.21 per diluted share, a drop from $0.54 in the third quarter of 2023 and $0.32 in the second quarter of 2024. The net income for the period stood at $2.9 million, down from $7.4 million in the third quarter of 2023 and $4.5 million in the second quarter of 2024. Notably, $6.6 million of bad debt adversely affected net income and earnings per diluted share in the quarter.

news.headline: MultiPlan Corporation reveals plans for Q3 2024 earnings call in New York.
news.summary: MultiPlan Corporation, based in New York, has recently disclosed that they will be hosting a conference call to discuss their earnings for the third quarter of 2024. The call is set to cover important financial information and performance metrics for the specified period. This event indicates a transparent approach to keeping shareholders and the public informed about the company's progress. This demonstrates the commitment of MultiPlan Corporation to maintaining open communication and accountability in their operations.

news.headline: Survey by Riverbed shows Financial Services ahead in AI, but data concerns hinder full potential.
news.summary: A recent report conducted by Riverbed in Redwood City, California, titled the Global AI & Digital Experience Survey, offers valuable insights into the Financial Services sector regarding the current and future impact of AI technology.

news.headline: Veea partners with ICT to enhance wireless connectivity and asset tracking in mining operations. First installation on Oct 20, 2024.
news.summary: In New York, Veea (NASDAQ: VEEA), a leading innovator in hyperconverged multiaccess networks featuring AI-powered cybersecurity, has collaborated with Inti Cakrawala Teknologi (ICT), a supplier of cutting-edge digital connectivity services. The partnership aims to offer advanced connectivity solutions and asset tracking to ICT's clients in the mining and energy sectors in Indonesia and across Southeast Asia. The initial implementation is set to begin on October 20, 2024. ICT serves a wide range of significant clients in the region.
